descriptionShort: Article on Richmond Sockeyes preparing for Centennial Cup tournament in Humboldt, featuring coach Orland Kurtenbach and owner Bruce Taylor.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes prepare for their national junior-A championship tournament opening Sunday in Humboldt. The team faces Atlantic champion Dartmouth in round-robin play, followed by Ontario's Pembroke and the host Humboldt Broncos. Coach Orland Kurtenbach and owner Bruce Taylor have rebuilt the roster with only nine players remaining from training camp and just one Richmond native on the squad.
